notes: Test build: separates 3-second frame/OCR operation timeouts from candidate deadlines, preserves a labeled provisional preview when strict confirmation is inconclusive, persists the exact clip plan, and replaces padded sync-sample muxing with Media3 exact-boundary export. Post-release API 35 QA remains required before this iteration is accepted.

updates.notes: Test build: separates 3-second frame/OCR operation timeouts from candidate deadlines, preserves a labeled provisional preview when strict confirmation is inconclusive, persists the exact clip plan, and replaces padded sync-sample muxing with Media3 exact-boundary export. Post-release API 35 QA remains required before this iteration is accepted.

Test build: adds confidence-preserving ML Kit evidence and conservative 6/9 glyph-topology adjudication. Exact API 35 Activity-closed QA reached 10/10 semantic transitions with zero false positives or timeouts; clip planning/export remains in progress because Gradual padding merged the first two windows and produced a 473.059-second output.

Test build: replaces the background-sensitive fixed candidate timeout with a bounded OCR-work-scaled guard. Exact API 35 background QA reached 70% transition recall with zero candidate timeouts; topology work remains in progress.
Test build: added bounded first-state refinement and Activity-closed QA coverage. Retained for rollback; fixed candidate deadlines caused a background semantic regression.
Test build: caps production semantic interval recursion at three stable-state probes while retaining deep deterministic recursion coverage. Phase 1 fixture validation remains in progress.

## What's new

- Fixed the Android 15 `InvalidForegroundServiceTypeException` crash by using typed WorkManager foreground execution.
- Restored visible 3-minute, 1-minute, and 5-minute checkpoint scan options.
- Kept Fast change-map (500 ms) as the default scan option.
- Preserved the existing ROI, change-map, checkpoint, clip, decoder, and export pipeline behavior.

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/hughbechainez-byte/CompilationMaker/compare/v0.17.2...v0.17.3
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/hughbechainez-byte/CompilationMaker/compare/v0.17.1...v0.17.2
